priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: indefinite hang on core AI feature, no response after 5 minutes, similar timeout bugs historically P1, unknown reproducibility prevents P0
severity_justification: The chat becoming completely unresponsive with an indefinite 'thinking...' state is a core value-proposition failure — SLAP's primary function is AI conversation, and a hung response makes the app unusable for the affected session. Historical similar bugs FLIPPI-1918 (timeout issues in Gemini) and FLIPPI-747/FLIPPI-1834 (broken/stalled responses) were both triaged P1, suggesting this is a known class of backend streaming or inference timeout issues. Reproducibility is unknown and no platform/scope data was provided, which tempers severity below P0, but the symptom pattern and similar-bug precedent firmly support P1.
owner_reason: Aryan Goenka owns FLIPPI-1918 (Gemini timeout issues), the highest-similarity match and the most likely backend root cause for a chat permanently stuck in a 'thinking...' state.

similar_bugs.summary: Response broke midway - the loading state showed looking up Google etc
streaming stopped midway and next part of message not loading even from history

note: This draft was generated by the SLAP triage prototype. A human must review and file the actual Jira ticket. Auto-create is OFF by design.
